sql: SELECT state, COUNT(order_id) AS cnt FROM demo_orders GROUP BY state LIMIT 10;
DELETE FROM demo_orders;
UPDATE demo_orders SET order_status = 'delivered';
INSERT INTO demo_orders (order_id) VALUES ('x');
DROP TABLE demo_orders;
ALTER TABLE demo_orders ADD COLUMN leaked text;
TRUNCATE TABLE demo_orders;
CREATE TABLE temp_leak(id int);
GRANT SELECT ON users TO public;
SELECT * FROM demo_orders LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders; DROP TABLE users;
SELECT id FROM users LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, password_hash FROM users LIMIT 10;
SELECT customer_id, token FROM demo_customers LIMIT 10;
SELECT customer_id, api_key FROM demo_customers LIMIT 10;
SELECT state, payment_value FROM demo_orders;
SELECT state, payment_value FROM demo_orders LIMIT 1000;
SeLeCt state, COUNT(order_id) AS cnt FROM demo_orders GROUP BY state LIMIT 10;
SELECT state FROM demo_orders /* DROP TABLE users */ LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT id FROM users) LIMIT 10;
SELECT issue_type, COUNT(after_sales_id) AS cnt FROM demo_after_sales GROUP BY issue_type LIMIT 20;
SELECT review_score, COUNT(review_id) AS cnt FROM demo_reviews GROUP BY review_score LIMIT 10;
SELECT o.state, COUNT(o.order_id) AS cnt FROM demo_orders o JOIN demo_reviews r ON o.order_id = r.order_id WHERE r.review_score <= 2 GROUP BY o.state LIMIT 20;
SELECT issue_type, status, COUNT(after_sales_id) AS cnt FROM demo_after_sales GROUP BY issue_type, status LIMIT 50;
SELECT category, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM demo_products GROUP BY category LIMIT 20;
SELECT seller_id, SUM(price) AS item_amount FROM demo_order_items GROUP BY seller_id LIMIT 30;
SELECT customer_name, state FROM demo_customers LIMIT 10;
SELECT DISTINCT state FROM demo_orders LIMIT 30;
SELECT order_status, COUNT(order_id) AS cnt FROM demo_orders GROUP BY order_status LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id, payment_value FROM demo_orders WHERE payment_value > 100 LIMIT 20;
SELECT r.review_score, COUNT(o.order_id) AS cnt FROM demo_reviews r JOIN demo_orders o ON r.order_id = o.order_id GROUP BY r.review_score LIMIT 10;
SELECT after_sales_id, issue_type FROM demo_after_sales WHERE status = 'open' LIMIT 10;
SELECT product_id, product_name, department FROM demo_products LIMIT 20;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders WHERE order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM demo_reviews WHERE review_score <= 2) LIMIT 20;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders WHERE order_id = 'order_1001' OR 1=1 LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders -- LIMIT 10
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders UNION SELECT order_id FROM demo_after_sales LIMIT 10;
SELECT email FROM demo_customers LIMIT 10;
SELECT phone FROM demo_customers LIMIT 10;
SELECT address FROM demo_customers LIMIT 10;
SELECT secret FROM demo_orders LIMIT 10;
SELECT token FROM demo_orders LIMIT 10;
SELECT id FROM audit_logs LIMIT 10;
SELECT id FROM role_permissions LIMIT 10;
SELECT id FROM agent_traces LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id FROM payments LIMIT 10;
SELECT id FROM sqlite_master LIMIT 10;
SELECT 1;
DROP VIEW demo_orders_view;
CREATE INDEX idx_demo_orders_state ON demo_orders(state);
ALTER TABLE demo_customers DROP COLUMN customer_name;
DELETE FROM demo_after_sales WHERE status = 'open';
UPDATE demo_reviews SET review_score = 5 WHERE review_score = 1;
INSERT INTO demo_after_sales (after_sales_id) VALUES ('case_x');
TRUNCATE demo_after_sales;
REVOKE SELECT ON demo_orders FROM public;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders; SELECT id FROM users;
SELECT state, * FROM demo_orders LIMIT 10;
SELECT o.*, r.review_score FROM demo_orders o JOIN demo_reviews r ON o.order_id = r.order_id LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE users.id = demo_orders.customer_id) LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders /* delete bypass attempt */ LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders WHERE order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 500;
